code:
mut i = 1
mut fizz_count = 0
mut buzz_count = 0

while i <= 15
  fizz_count = fizz_count + 1
  buzz_count = buzz_count + 1

  let is_fizz = fizz_count == 3
  let is_buzz = buzz_count == 5

  if is_fizz and is_buzz
    print("FizzBuzz")
  else if is_fizz
    print("Fizz")
  else if is_buzz
    print("Buzz")
  else
    print("#{i}")
  end

  if is_fizz
    fizz_count = 0
  end
  if is_buzz
    buzz_count = 0
  end

  i = i + 1
end
